description: Secrets store — holds API keys/passwords for generated tools so secrets never live in plugin.json or reach the LLM.

capabilities.name: secret.set
capabilities.description: Store a secret value by key. Called out-of-band by the gateway (console/telegram) — never by an agent/LLM.

capabilities.name: secret.get
capabilities.description: Fetch a secret value by key. Called by a tool at runtime to read its own configured secret.

capabilities.name: secret.has
capabilities.description: Check whether a secret exists by key. Returns 'true' or 'false'.

capabilities.name: secret.request
capabilities.description: Ask the user to provide a missing secret (API key, password, token). Use this whenever a tool reports — usually via an error — that a required secret is not set. Pass the secret 'key' and a human 'prompt' explaining what is needed — NEVER a value. The chat gateway captures the user's next reply directly and stores it encrypted; the secret value never passes through you or the conversation. After it is provided, retry the action that needed it.

key.description: Secret name the user must provide, e.g. EMAIL_SMTP_PASSWORD

prompt.description: Message shown to the user asking for the secret
